# chalk_managed_aws_vpc (Resource)

Chalk managed AWS VPC resource. Creates a fully managed VPC using the provided cloud credentials.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr_block` (String) The IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC.
- `cloud_credential_id` (String) ID of the cloud credential to use for the managed VPC
- `subnets` (Attributes List) A list of subnets for the VPC. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subnets))

### Optional

- `additional_cidr_blocks` (List of String) A list of additional IPv4 CIDR blocks for the VPC.
- `additional_private_routes` (Attributes List) A list of additional private routes for the VPC. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--additional_private_routes))
- `additional_public_routes` (Attributes List) A list of additional public routes for the VPC. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--additional_public_routes))

### Read-Only

- `designator` (String) VPC designator
- `id` (String) VPC identifier
- `name` (String) VPC name

<a id="nestedatt--subnets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subnets`

Required:

- `availability_zone` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `private_cidr_block` (String)
- `public_cidr_block` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--additional_private_routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `additional_private_routes`

Required:

- `destination_cidr_block` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `peer_id` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--additional_public_routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `additional_public_routes`

Required:

- `destination_cidr_block` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `peer_id` (String)
